The Nevada IndependentTesla pays Nevada $200K in fines for operating battery recycling equipment without permitTesla will pay Nevada $200000 for operating battery recycling equipment at its Northern Nevada Tesla Gigafactory without a permit, according to a settlement....6 days ago
